title: AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Research Scientist I Posts
description: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh) has declared the official notification for Project Research Scientist I Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Any Degree, Post Graduation can use this chance and apply for the AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested candidates can apply before the last date.
